title: Eekso — the fortress on the water
bodyText:
A **fortress/outpost the river runs under and through**, reached at the end of S25 — the party rushed inside fleeing a second umber-hulk roar. **This is where the multi-session dungeon crawl begins** (the long approach to the cult-held pool).

> [!dm] Deliberately undesigned yet (grill 2026-07-09): the crawl gets its own prep session. Shape candidates floated: drowned pre-Event works / the cult's outer defenses / old Thundrak-Dûrn-adjacent tunnels. Known hooks pointing here:
> - **LOCKED lore:** the shed upstream belonged to a **[[thundrak-durn|Thundrak Dûrn]] slave-scholar** — an elf collared by the dwarven city and sent to study the pool (the city wants to weaponize it too; everyone does). **Their surviving research inside Eekso is the party's lore-delivery system** for the network rules — and a thread to Thundrak Dûrn for later.
> - **Felson's bottled courier-fragments** can be tested against that research ([[the-pool]]).
> - Something with an ear-shattering roar is **behind** the party (nature parked — [[grill-queue]]).
> - The river that runs through it is the pool's own artery — couriers pass THROUGH this place.

# Threads
